sourcesContent:
export const data = {
  name: "Sheetal Birla",
  title: "Frontend Developer",
  tagline: "Crafting responsive, pixel-perfect web experiences with React & modern UI.",
  phone: "6267745870",
  email: "sheetalbirla027@gmail.com",
  linkedin: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/sheetalbirla-b4100a202",
  github: "https://github.com/Sheetal1902",
  summary:
    "Frontend Developer with 1+ year of hands-on experience building responsive, production-grade web applications using React.js, Redux, and REST APIs. Delivered 10+ projects across diverse domains — from inventory management to algorithmic trading platforms — in a fast-paced agency environment. Passionate about clean component architecture, performance optimisation, and intuitive user experiences.",

  skills: [
    { category: "Languages", items: ["JavaScript", "HTML/CSS", "Java", "C", "C++", "SQL"] },
    { category: "Frameworks", items: ["ReactJS", "Bootstrap", "Redux", "Tailwind CSS", "Material UI", "GSAP"] },
    { category: "Tools", items: ["VS Code", "Vite", "Postman", "Swagger", "Chrome DevTools", "Eclipse"] },
    { category: "Version Control", items: ["Git", "GitHub"] },
    { category: "State Management", items: ["Redux", "Context API"] },
    { category: "API Handling", items: ["REST API", "Axios", "Fetch API"] },
    { category: "Practices", items: ["Responsive Design", "Cross-Browser Compatibility", "Agile/Scrum"] },
  ],

  experience: [
    {
      role: "Frontend Developer",
      company: "Infinix Infotech Pvt. Ltd.",
      period: "Feb 2025 – Present",
      location: "Indore, Madhya Pradesh",
      highlights: [
        "Mailbox System: Built complete mail management app (React + Redux) with compose, inbox, attachments, CK Editor, and Excel paste support.",
        "Infinix Websites (infinix.tech & infinix.in): Enhanced corporate websites with UI improvements, animations, and content updates.",
        "Web Infinix Platform: Developed internal web platform with new UI components, feature enhancements, and continuous bug fixing.",
        "Service-Based Website: Built responsive contact & services pages with modern UI design.",
        "Inventory Management System: Developed React frontend with backend API integration for real-time inventory tracking.",
        "Algo Research Platform: Frontend support for algorithmic trading research system with improved data visualisation.",
        "Algorithmic Trading Software: Implemented UI fixes, feature support, and API integrations for trading functionalities.",
        "Advocate Website: Designed responsive legal services website with profile pages and improved UX.",
        "Chambal Business Website: Developed UI components and resolved bugs for better performance.",
        "Nextera Infotech Website: Built complete React frontend with component-based architecture and responsive design.",
        "Documentation & Maintenance: Authored technical docs and handled maintenance across 10+ live projects.",
      ],
    },
    {
      role: "Web Developer Intern",
      company: "The Sparks Foundation",
      period: "May 2020 – Jun 2020",
      location: "Remote",
      highlights: [
        "Designed and developed a fully functional banking-themed website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.",
        "Implemented interactive UI components with cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.",
      ],
    },
    {
      role: "Developer Intern",
      company: "Accenture",
      period: "May 2023",
      location: "Indore, Madhya Pradesh",
      highlights: [
        "Participated in a virtual internship focused on real-world software development and agile methodologies.",
        "Gained hands-on experience in code optimisation and agile practices like sprint planning and stand-ups.",
      ],
    },
  ],

  projects: [
    {
      name: "Trade App",
      subtitle: "Freelance Project",
      tech: ["ReactJS", "Bootstrap", "PHP", "GSAP", "CSS"],
      period: "Jan 2025 – Apr 2025",
      description:
        "Fully responsive trading-themed web application with GSAP animations, custom CSS components, Bootstrap layout and optimised cross-device performance.",
      points: [
        "Built engaging UI using Bootstrap + GSAP animations for smooth interactions.",
        "Responsive layout optimised for cross-device compatibility.",
        "Clean component-based architecture for maintainability.",
      ],
      color: "#0ea5e9",
    },
    {
      name: "Expense Tracker",
      subtitle: "Personal Project",
      tech: ["JavaScript", "HTML", "CSS"],
      period: "Nov 2023",
      description:
        "Responsive personal-finance app with real-time balance updates, transaction history, and category-based filtering using vanilla JavaScript.",
      points: [
        "Real-time balance updates and transaction history.",
        "Category-based filtering for personal finance management.",
        "Fully responsive vanilla JS application.",
      ],
      color: "#10b981",
    },
  ],

  education: [
    {
      degree: "B.Tech in Computer Science",
      school: "Shri G. S. Institute of Technology and Science",
      location: "Indore",
      period: "Sep 2021 – May 2024",
    },
    {
      degree: "Diploma in Computer Science",
      school: "Government Polytechnic College",
      location: "Sanawad",
      period: "Jul 2018 – May 2021",
      detail: "CGPA: 8.95",
    },
    {
      degree: "10th Boards",
      school: "Abhigyan International School",
      location: "Sanawad",
      period: "May 2018",
      detail: "Percentage: 85%",
    },
  ],

  coursework: [
    "Data Structures", "Algorithms", "Operating System",
    "Database Management", "Software Engineering",
    "Software Methodology", "Agile Methodology", "Programming",
  ],
};
